'''lamojo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:drafting|drafting]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-m-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:drafting|drafting]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| lamojo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:læmejeth|læmejeth]] || [[word:læmejej|læmejej]] || [[word:læmejesh|læmejesh]] || [[word:læmeje|læmeje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lamomojoth|lamomojoth]] || [[word:lamomojoj|lamomojoj]] || [[word:lamomojosh|lamomojosh]] || [[word:lamomojo|lamomojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lamojoth|lamojoth]] || [[word:lamojoj|lamojoj]] || [[word:lamojosh|lamojosh]] || [[word:lamojo|lamojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lamofjoth|lamofjoth]] || [[word:lamofjoj|lamofjoj]] || [[word:lamofjosh|lamofjosh]] || [[word:lamofjof|lamofjof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lamojotho|lamojotho]] || [[word:lamojojo|lamojojo]] || [[word:lamojosho|lamojosho]] || [[word:lamojoko|lamojoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lamojoth|lamojoth]] || [[word:lamojoj|lamojoj]] || [[word:lamojosh|lamojosh]] || [[word:lamojo|lamojo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lamojothol|lamojothol]] || [[word:lamojojol|lamojojol]] || [[word:lamojoshol|lamojoshol]] || [[word:lamojokol|lamojokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lamojothotho|lamojothotho]] || [[word:lamojojojo|lamojojojo]] || [[word:lamojoshosho|lamojoshosho]] || [[word:lamojoko|lamojoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lamojothon|lamojothon]] || [[word:lamojojon|lamojojon]] || [[word:lamojoshon|lamojoshon]] || [[word:lamojokon|lamojokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lamojothoro|lamojothoro]] || [[word:lamojojoro|lamojojoro]] || [[word:lamojoshoro|lamojoshoro]] || [[word:lamojokoro|lamojokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
